summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, closes, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed individually; unrelated non-security PRs are kept for maintainer review or normal backlog handling.

actions.reason: UI iframe rendering changes touch a security boundary and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not backlog cleanup.
Focused Telegram behavior PR with supplied proof; keep for normal maintainer review rather than close or merge in this shard.
Small docs PR is reviewable but has a maintainer/product wording decision outstanding, so it should remain open and related to docs backlog review.
Distinct provider compatibility fix with failing proof/check evidence; keep open independently for proof or maintainer review.
Independent memory-lancedb feature/config PR; not a duplicate or close candidate in this inventory shard.
Focused non-security Signal bug fix with failing proof; keep open independently for proof or maintainer review.
Security-sensitive linked issue must be quarantined individually to central OpenClaw security handling.
Exec approval revocation/writeback behavior is security-sensitive and already has maintainer security-review signals; route only this PR.
Approval-routing PR is related to prior approval work but remains a distinct open behavior change requiring maintainer review.
Broad WhatsApp feature PR is related to messaging/channel backlog but not closable or mergeable; it needs author/maintainer follow-up.
Automation and operator-guidance rewrite is marked security-boundary sensitive; route to central security/maintainer handling instead of cleanup.
